status.linked: Akawunti ya ku OSI Server eyungibbwa

warning.title: Kigambiddwa
warning.message: Oluvannyuma lw'okuyungibwa, oteekwa okozesa ebintu by'okuyingira by'OSI Server. Ekigambo kyo ky'okulinda eky'omu bitundu kijja kussibwako ekigambo ky'okulinda eky'oku server.

success.title: Kiyungibwa bulungi
success.message: Akawunti yo kati eyungiddwa nga {{username}} ku OSI Server.

unlink.confirm: Oli mukakafu? Oluvannyuma lw'okugyamu, oteekwa okozesa ekigambo kyo ky'okulinda eky'omu bitundu ekya mazima.

errors.networkError: Teyinziddwa kutuuka ku OSI Server. Kebera endabirwamu n'okuteekateeka kwo kw'omukutu.
errors.authFailed: Ebintu by'okuyingira by'OSI Server si bya mazima.
